Stock up +18.7% over 1y and +5.7% over 3m, leaving limited margin of safety
Quality remains intact: ROE 29.6%, operating margin 22.1%, net margin 17.8% — but already reflected in multiples
News sentiment positive but thematic (dividend king, hold-forever) rather than catalyst-driven

trace.final_explanation: LLM-only baseline: 29/30 views on 2024-10-01 via minimax/minimax-m3.
